name: Verify Numerical Reasoning
description: Measures ability to understand and analyse numerical data and make correct decisions. Suitable for roles requiring data interpretation and quantitative reasoning.

name: Verify Verbal Reasoning
description: Measures ability to understand and evaluate written information and draw logical conclusions. Used for roles requiring communication and written comprehension.

name: Verify Inductive Reasoning
description: Measures ability to identify patterns in abstract information and solve novel problems. Ideal for technical and analytical roles.

name: Verify Deductive Reasoning
description: Measures ability to draw logical conclusions from given information. Suitable for structured problem solving roles.

name: Verify Interactive - General Ability
description: Adaptive cognitive ability test combining numerical, verbal, and inductive reasoning for professional and managerial roles.

name: Verify G+ General Ability
description: Short adaptive general cognitive ability assessment for high-volume entry-level hiring.

name: OPQ32r
description: Occupational Personality Questionnaire measuring 32 dimensions of workplace personality and behavioural style. Predicts performance across professional and managerial roles.

name: Motivation Questionnaire (MQ)
description: Assesses 18 dimensions of motivation to understand what energises and drives an individual at work.

name: General Sales Aptitude (GSA)
description: Assesses personality traits relevant to sales performance including persuasiveness, resilience, and customer orientation.

name: Java 8 (New)
description: Measures core Java 8 knowledge including OOP, syntax, collections, streams, and standard libraries for software developer roles.

name: Core Java (Advanced Level)
description: Advanced Java covering concurrency, JVM internals, design patterns, and enterprise-level concepts.

name: Python (New)
description: Assesses Python programming including syntax, data structures, OOP, and standard libraries for data science, automation, and backend roles.

name: JavaScript (New)
description: Tests JavaScript fundamentals, DOM manipulation, async programming, and ES6+ features for front-end and full-stack roles.

name: React (New)
description: Evaluates React.js knowledge including component design, hooks, state management, and lifecycle for front-end developer roles.

name: Angular (New)
description: Tests Angular knowledge including components, modules, services, routing, and RxJS for front-end developer roles.

name: C# (New)
description: Assesses C# proficiency including OOP, LINQ, async/await, and .NET fundamentals for software developer roles.

name: C++ (New)
description: Tests C++ knowledge including memory management, STL, OOP, and modern C++ features.

name: SQL (New)
description: Evaluates SQL querying, joins, aggregations, subqueries, and database design for data analyst and backend developer roles.

name: Microsoft SQL Server (New)
description: Tests SQL Server knowledge including T-SQL, stored procedures, indexing, and database administration.

name: Data Analysis (New)
description: Evaluates data analysis concepts including statistical thinking, data wrangling, visualisation, and insight generation.

name: Machine Learning (New)
description: Tests machine learning concepts including supervised and unsupervised learning, model evaluation, feature engineering, and common algorithms.

name: HTML/CSS (New)
description: Assesses HTML5 and CSS3 knowledge including semantic markup, responsive design, flexbox, and grid for front-end roles.

name: PHP (New)
description: Tests PHP knowledge including syntax, OOP, web integration, and frameworks for back-end web developer roles.

name: .NET Framework (New)
description: Evaluates .NET ecosystem knowledge including ASP.NET, Entity Framework, and development patterns.

name: Agile Software Development
description: Tests Agile methodologies including Scrum, Kanban, sprint planning, and best practices for software development teams.

name: Project Management (New)
description: Assesses project management methodologies, scheduling, resource management, risk, and stakeholder communication.

name: Microsoft Excel (Advanced)
description: Tests advanced Excel including pivot tables, macros, complex formulas, and data analysis for analyst and finance roles.

name: Accounting (New)
description: Tests foundational accounting knowledge including financial statements, bookkeeping, and basic financial analysis.

name: Financial Accounting (New)
description: Evaluates advanced financial accounting including GAAP, financial reporting, and analysis for finance professional roles.

name: Business Analysis (New)
description: Tests business analysis concepts including requirements gathering, process mapping, and stakeholder management.

name: Situational Judgement Test - Manager
description: Presents realistic managerial scenarios to assess decision-making and judgement for people management roles.

name: Situational Judgement Test - Graduate
description: Assesses judgement and decision-making in workplace scenarios for graduate and entry-level professional roles.

name: Customer Service Solution
description: Assesses customer service skills, communication style, and situational judgement for contact centre and customer-facing roles.

name: Retail Solution
description: Evaluates personality traits and situational judgement for customer-facing retail roles including service orientation and teamwork.

name: Leadership Report (OPQ)
description: Uses OPQ32 data to evaluate leadership potential and style across key competencies for senior roles.

name: Sales Report (OPQ)
description: Uses OPQ32 data to evaluate behavioural styles relevant to sales success including drive, customer focus, and influencing ability.

name: Verify Calculation
description: Measures basic numerical calculation ability for clerical and administrative roles where accuracy with numbers is essential.

name: Verify Checking
description: Assesses accuracy and attention to detail when checking written and numerical information for administrative roles.

name: Graduate/IPAT General Ability
description: General cognitive ability test for graduate and professional-level roles measuring verbal, numerical, and abstract reasoning.

name: Numerical Reasoning for Managers
description: Advanced numerical reasoning for managerial and executive candidates requiring strong financial decision-making skills.

name: Administrative Professional Solution
description: Combines ability and personality measures for administrative roles including attention to detail, organisation, and service orientation.

name: Supply Chain Management (New)
description: Tests supply chain concepts including procurement, logistics, inventory management, and operations planning.

name: Call Centre Solution
description: Evaluates skills and personality traits for call centre roles including communication, empathy, and composure under pressure.

name: Microsoft Word (Intermediate)
description: Evaluates intermediate Microsoft Word skills for administrative and office-based roles.

name: Workplace Safety Solution
description: Assesses safety awareness, rule compliance, and risk-taking attitudes for roles in safety-critical environments.

name: Technology Professional Solution
description: Combines cognitive and personality measures for technology professional roles including analytical thinking and collaborative working.
